creator: andrej.brodnik@upr.si
text:
Hi,

I made it working. The problem was, that gnome-screenlock was compiled with
a PAM support.

Thanx!

LPA (== {Lep pozdrav! Andrej}_{Slovene} == {Best Regards, Andrej})

Citiram "Andrej Brodnik (Andy)" <andrej.brodnik@upr.si>:
>
> Hi,
>
> I have the same problem. Here is the gnoma part of my rc.conf file:
>
> ----
> ####
> # Gnome2
> gnome_enable="YES"
> dbus_enable="YES"
> hald_enable="YES"
> ----
>
> I'm also appending two xsession-errors files. I would greatly appreciate
> any/all help.
>
> Thanx!
>
> Andrej



----------------------------------------------------------------
